hypothesis: Competence-authority mismatch threshold theta approx 2.0 triggers degenerative spiral
method: For 54 domains with >=2 merged lanes (N=919 total), computed mismatch = (authority_share / equal_share) / competence_ratio where authority = dispatch fraction and competence = domain mean Sharpe / overall mean Sharpe

pre_registration_outcomes.declining_merge_rate: PARTIALLY CONFIRMED — spiral in diversity space not quality space

revised_model: Two-threshold: theta_quality=5x (quality decay), theta_diversity=0.30 (diversity collapse). Diversity-first, quality-secondary.
